article.title: [Interview] [Frontend] [TC] [L5A] Uber Bangalore
article.content:
Little less than 8 YOE, working as SDE-2 in FAANG adjacent
**Current TC** 58L

### Compensation

> **Base**: 70L
**Stocks**: $30K/year for 4 years
**Bonus**: 14.6L
**Year 1 misc** 5L

> **Accepted TC**: ~1.15 CR


### Interview

```
screening [1 Hour]: 
JS memoization utility that caches response of a callback based async function

coding 1 [1 Hour]: 
similar not exact LC 764 Largest Plus Sign

coding 2 [1 Hour]: 
React coding -> build a Jira like DnD. free to consult MDN docs
```

*You ought to pass C1 & C2 to move to next rounds*

```
Design [1 Hour]: 
Config driven UI widget builder and how to do client integration

HM [1 Hour 45 mins]: 
Behavioral + prev project walkthrough 

```

post.content: what magic did you do, in current market got 100% hike?
Congratulation Brother,\n\nI would like to connect with you for long term front end dev career guidance please help me with you for point of contact.
Congratulations man!! Pls share the interview experience, would be very helpful
If you can share your exact experience that would be great
your stocks are greater than my whole year CTC, probably you will also be paying my salary equivalent tax also, Still long way to go, Congrats!!
